'''Bofa II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that housed an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cargo Transfer Area]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and was the distribution site of Imperial surveillance droids. The [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Libom]]'' was captured there.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Bofa II first appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''. [[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide|''The Official Strategy Guide'']] for the game later spelled the planet's name with a "t" and ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] both originally contained a system named "Bota." An update of the Online Companion later changed the system's name to "Bofa."
